name: pier
description: Automated static website deployment project with GitHub Actions CI/CD to Azure VPS, supports HTTPS/Nginx/Docker

files.entrypoint.sh: Container startup script for SSL certificate detection and HTTPS configuration

secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD: Docker Hub Access Token (requires repo permission)

architecture.description: Code push to master -> GitHub Actions builds image -> Push to Docker Hub -> SSH to VPS restart container
flow: 1. Developer push code to GitHub master branch
3. Build Docker image and push to Docker Hub
4. SSH remote to VPS to execute docker pull and docker run
5. Container uses Let's Encrypt certificate to provide HTTPS service

deployment.auto_restart: Using --restart=always policy, auto start after VPS reboot
deployment.ssl: Let's Encrypt free certificate, located at /etc/letsencrypt

instructions.for_ai: All AI operations on this project should follow: 1. Use English comments and commit messages 2. After modifying HTML content, commit and push 3. Workflow file modifications will automatically trigger deployment 4. Ensure no secrets are leaked to code 5. Keep code clean
